name: Dead pool square
description:
This once was the market square, the famous Square of Midgaard.
A large, peculiar looking statue is standing in the middle of the square.
Roads lead in every direction, north to the fallen temple square, south to the
zombies square, east and westbound is the main street.

extra_descriptions.description: What you see is the Midgaard Worm, stretching around the Palace of Midgaard.
